# Pixi Wiki Namespace Registry

> Pixi Wiki turns my notes, project docs, research, and working context into structured, maintained knowledge bases. Humans browse them like a wiki. Agents read them natively as plain Markdown with llms.txt.

> Raw Markdown: `/raw/<slug>/<path>`. Human HTML: `/wiki/<slug>/<path>.html`. Namespace agents: `/wiki/<slug>/llms.txt`.

## Pixi Vault

> Vault architecture, Wiki Compiler Maps, AgentWikis compatibility, namespace compiler logic, source/output repo boundaries, and pixi-wiki publication model.
> Current as of: 2026-06-16 — Pixi Wiki public artifact recorded; content pack v1 plus generated-site UX contract now compiled.
> Agent access: [/wiki/pixi-vault/llms.txt](/wiki/pixi-vault/llms.txt) [/wiki/pixi-vault/llms-full.txt](/wiki/pixi-vault/llms-full.txt) [/wiki/pixi-vault/index.json](/wiki/pixi-vault/index.json)

- [Pixi Vault Namespace Instructions](/raw/pixi-vault/CLAUDE.md) ([html](/wiki/pixi-vault/CLAUDE.md.html))
- [Pixi Vault](/raw/pixi-vault/README.md) ([html](/wiki/pixi-vault/README.md.html))
- [Wiki Compiler Map and Source Classes](/raw/pixi-vault/wiki/concepts/wiki-compiler-map-and-source-classes.md) ([html](/wiki/pixi-vault/wiki/concepts/wiki-compiler-map-and-source-classes.md.html))
- [Pixi Wiki](/raw/pixi-vault/wiki/entities/pixi-wiki.md) ([html](/wiki/pixi-vault/wiki/entities/pixi-wiki.md.html))
- [Pixi Vault — Master Index](/raw/pixi-vault/wiki/index.md) ([html](/wiki/pixi-vault/wiki/index.md.html))
- [Pixi Vault — Activity Log](/raw/pixi-vault/wiki/log.md) ([html](/wiki/pixi-vault/wiki/log.md.html))

## Agent Workflows

> Pixoid/Tinker/Quill/Boba operating model, Hermes Mission Control, route governance, memory boundaries, context handoffs, Knowledge Pack Routing, agent entrypoint meshes, static retrieval/eval gates, self-improving agent systems, and workflow reliability practices.
> Current as of: 2026-06-18 — Ponytail minimal-code discipline added as a compiled workflow concept.
> Agent access: [/wiki/agent-workflows/llms.txt](/wiki/agent-workflows/llms.txt) [/wiki/agent-workflows/llms-full.txt](/wiki/agent-workflows/llms-full.txt) [/wiki/agent-workflows/index.json](/wiki/agent-workflows/index.json)
